Video.summary: An old man (Joel McCrea) recalls his days as a young man (Jody McCrea) fighting Indians in the Old West.
Video.title: Cry Blood, Apache

Video.summary: A New York police officer, shot and wounded by a gangster, travels to Cheyenne, Wyo., to recuperate at his family's ranch, and is surprised to find a bootlegger from New York running a speakeasy there.
Video.title: Broadway to Cheyenne

Video.summary: A law officer tries to bring a traitorous mine foreman to justice.
Video.title: The Courageous Avenger

Video.summary: The frontiersman (Bruce Bennett) leads settlers to Kentucky, where he makes peace with a Shawnee chief (Lon Chaney).
Video.title: Daniel Boone, Trail Blazer

Video.summary: Texas ranchers blame a homeless drifter (John Barrymore Jr.) for two killers' dirty work.
Video.title: High Lonesome

Video.summary: Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) and sidekick Lucky (Russell Hayden) help a railroad man (Matt Moore) thwart a land baron.
Video.title: Range War

Video.summary: A cowboy (John Wayne) romances a pretty woman (Marion Burns) while tracking the outlaw gang that killed his father.
Video.title: The Dawn Rider

Video.summary: Jeb Stuart and George Custer get stationed at Fort Leavenworth in Kansas and work together to stop abolitionist John Brown.
Video.title: Santa Fe Trail

Video.summary: The frontier hero (Roy Rogers) sings and saves Civil War gold with his sidekick (George "Gabby" Hayes).
Video.title: Young Bill Hickok

Video.summary: U.S. marshals (Johnny Mack Brown, Raymond Hatton) catch rustlers swapping cattle for Mexican jewels.
Video.title: Raiders of the Border

Video.summary: When white settlers start to move in on their sacred grounds, a tribe of female Indians vow to do anything they can to stop them.
Video.title: Revenge of the Virgins

Video.summary: A tough cowboy has a head-to-head confrontation with a gang of outlaws using a rodeo as its base of operations.
Video.title: The Man From Utah

Video.summary: Billy the Kid (Buster Crabbe) stages a shootout with outlaws who have transformed an innocent young lady into a wanted desperado.
Video.title: Fugitive of the Plains

Video.summary: Billie Jo discovers that her late father wanted her to be a doctor.
Video.title: My Daughter the Doctor

Video.summary: Herby Bates, who is sweet on Billie Jo, won't be seeing much more of her, he has just been drafted.
Video.title: Herby Gets Drafted

Video.summary: Homer plans to keep the Cannonball from making its Christmas caroling tour.
Video.title: Cannonball Christmas

Video.summary: Bobbie Jo falls for Alan Landman (Dennis Hopper), a poet and beatnik.
Video.title: Bobbie Jo and the Beatnik

Video.summary: Outlaw gangs are stealing gold from Chinese miners and driving them off of their claims.
Video.title: Chinaman's Chance

Video.summary: Pat and Stoney hunt a legendary golden wolf that roams the Colorado foothills.
Video.title: The Golden Wolf

Video.summary: Pat & Stoney seek missing government gold hidden in Ozarks.
Video.title: Ozark Gold

Video.summary: While in Wyoming to oversee a land deal, Pat and Stoney take care of a pair of twins.
Video.title: Secret Mission

Video.summary: Mr. Kenyon and his children come across a cache of gunpowder in an abandoned cabin.
Video.title: Border Raiders

Video.summary: A young man is accused of murder; he makes a run for it.
Video.title: Desperate Journey

Video.summary: The Judge sets out to capture an infamous and dangerous train robber who escaped from prison.
Video.title: Black Jack

Video.summary: Judge Roy Bean endeavors to exact justice in the small town of Langtry in the Old West. In this episode, the Judge and Jeff take on the richest man in the valley over water rights.
Video.title: The Cross-Draw Kid

Video.summary: Jeff Taggert's brother is accused of robbing the Del Rio bank; while investigating the case, Jeff becomes implicated in the hold up.
Video.title: The Defense Rests

Video.summary: The judge learns of a scheme to smuggle guns and ammo to the Indians and finds a way to break it up.
Video.title: Citizen Romeo

Video.summary: Sheriff Blade arrives from Comstock to arrest rancher Del Randall on what appears to the Judge in trumped-up charges; Bean and Taggart put Del in jail for safety while they investigate.
Video.title: Deliver the Body

Video.summary: Doc resorts to extreme measures to fund his free public clinic.
Video.title: Checkmate
